<path>/home/himmel/personal/prsui/components/ui/text-flip.tsx</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>
1: "use client";
2: 
3: import type { Transition, Variants } from "motion/react";
4: import { AnimatePresence, motion } from "motion/react";
5: import { Children, useEffect, useState } from "react";
6: 
7: import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";
8: 
9: const defaultVariants: Variants = {
10:   animate: { opacity: 1, y: 0 },
11:   exit: { opacity: 0, y: 8 },
12:   initial: { opacity: 0, y: -8 },
13: };
14: 
15: type MotionElement = typeof motion.p | typeof motion.span | typeof motion.code;
16: 
17: export interface TextFlipProps {
18:   as?: MotionElement;
19:   className?: string;
20:   children: React.ReactNode[];
21:   interval?: number;
22:   transition?: Transition;
23:   variants?: Variants;
24:   onIndexChange?: (index: number) => void;
25: }
26: 
27: export const TextFlip = ({
28:   as: Component = motion.p,
29:   className,
30:   children,
31:   interval = 2,
32:   transition = { duration: 0.3 },
33:   variants = defaultVariants,
34:   onIndexChange,
35: }: TextFlipProps) => {
36:   const [currentIndex, setCurrentIndex] = useState(0);
37: 
38:   const items = Children.toArray(children);
39: 
40:   useEffect(() => {
41:     const timer = setInterval(() => {
42:       setCurrentIndex((prev) => {
43:         const next = (prev + 1) % items.length;
44:         onIndexChange?.(next);
45:         return next;
46:       });
47:     }, interval * 1000);
48: 
49:     return () => clearInterval(timer);
50:   }, [items.length, interval, onIndexChange]);
51: 
52:   return (
53:     <AnimatePresence mode="wait" initial={false}>
54:       <Component
55:         key={currentIndex}
56:         className={cn("inline-block", className)}
57:         initial="initial"
58:         animate="animate"
59:         exit="exit"
60:         transition={transition}
61:         variants={variants}
62:       >
63:         {items[currentIndex]}
64:       </Component>
65:     </AnimatePresence>
66:   );
67: };

(End of file - total 67 lines)
</content>

<path>/home/himmel/personal/prsui/lib/ease.ts</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>
1: // Shared motion tokens. Easing curves mirror the CSS custom properties in
2: // globals.css; springs are the canonical physics used across components.
3: // Strong custom variants — defaults like `ease-in`/`ease-out` feel weak.
4: 
5: export const EASE_OUT = [0.16, 1, 0.3, 1] as const;
6: export const EASE_IN_OUT = [0.77, 0, 0.175, 1] as const;
7: export const EASE_DRAWER = [0.32, 0.72, 0, 1] as const;
8: 
9: /** CSS string form of EASE_OUT for inline style transitions. */
10: export const EASE_OUT_CSS = "cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1)";
11: 
12: /** Press feedback on buttons and other tappable surfaces. */
13: export const SPRING_PRESS = {
14:   damping: 30,
15:   mass: 0.6,
16:   stiffness: 500,
17:   type: "spring",
18: } as const;
19: 
20: /** Content swaps — label/icon slots trading places inside a control. */
21: export const SPRING_SWAP = {
22:   damping: 30,
23:   mass: 0.55,
24:   stiffness: 460,
25:   type: "spring",
26: } as const;
27: 
28: /** Overlay panel entrances — modals and sheets summoned by pointer. */
29: export const SPRING_PANEL = {
30:   damping: 40,
31:   mass: 0.5,
32:   stiffness: 420,
33:   type: "spring",
34: } as const;
35: 
36: /** Shared-layout glides — pills, indicators and panels morphing between positions. */
37: export const SPRING_LAYOUT = {
38:   damping: 32,
39:   mass: 0.6,
40:   stiffness: 360,
41:   type: "spring",
42: } as const;
43: 
44: /** Cursor-follow physics for decorative mouse tracking (magnetic, tilt, dock). */
45: export const SPRING_MOUSE = {
46:   damping: 15,
47:   mass: 0.3,
48:   stiffness: 200,
49: } as const;

(End of file - total 49 lines)
</content>

<path>/home/himmel/personal/prsui/registry/new-york/smooth-input.tsx</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>
1: "use client";
2: 
3: import {
4:   motion,
5:   useMotionValue,
6:   useReducedMotion,
7:   useSpring,
8: } from "framer-motion";
9: import React, { useEffect, useRef, useState } from "react";
10: import type { ComponentPropsWithoutRef } from "react";
11: 
12: import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";
13: 
14: type InputFieldProps = ComponentPropsWithoutRef<"input"> & {
15:   wrapperClassName?: string;
16: };
17: 
18: type SmoothInputType = "text" | "password";
19: 
20: type SmoothInputProps = Omit<InputFieldProps, "type"> & {
21:   type?: SmoothInputType;
22: };
23: 
24: const PASSWORD_CHAR = /firefox|fxios/i.test(navigator.userAgent)
25:   ? "\u25CF"
26:   : "\u2022";
27: 
28: const scrollCaretIntoView = (
29:   target: HTMLInputElement,
30:   absoluteWidth: number
31: ) => {
32:   const styles = window.getComputedStyle(target);
33:   const paddingLeft = Number.parseFloat(styles.paddingLeft) || 0;
34:   const paddingRight = Number.parseFloat(styles.paddingRight) || 0;
35:   const maxScroll = Math.max(0, target.scrollWidth - target.clientWidth);
36:   const visibleRight = target.scrollLeft + target.clientWidth - paddingRight;
37:   const visibleLeft = target.scrollLeft + paddingLeft;
38: 
39:   if (absoluteWidth > visibleRight) {
40:     target.scrollLeft = Math.min(
41:       absoluteWidth - target.clientWidth + paddingRight,
42:       maxScroll
43:     );
44:     return;
45:   }
46: 
47:   if (absoluteWidth < visibleLeft) {
48:     target.scrollLeft = Math.max(0, absoluteWidth - paddingLeft);
49:   }
50: };

41: // Local springs keep the accordion's connected groups moving together while
42: // avoiding scale projection on text-heavy row contents.
43: // Gap spring: must not overshoot y — positive y overshoot drifts items below
44: // their mt-3 resting point and briefly overlaps the next item.
45: const ROW_TRANSITION: Transition = {
46:   bounce: 0.18,
47:   duration: 0.45,
48:   type: "spring",
49: };

1: "use client";
2: 
3: import { cva } from "class-variance-authority";
4: import type { VariantProps } from "class-variance-authority";
5: import { Toggle as TogglePrimitive } from "radix-ui";
6: import * as React from "react";
7: 
8: import { useFeedback } from "@/hooks/use-feedback";
9: import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";
10: 
11: const toggleVariants = cva(
12:   "inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2 rounded-md text-sm font-medium whitespace-nowrap transition-[color,box-shadow] outline-none hover:bg-muted hover:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:border-ring focus-visible:ring-[3px] focus-visible:ring-ring/50 disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 aria-invalid:border-destructive aria-invalid:ring-destructive/20 data-[state=on]:bg-accent data-[state=on]:text-accent-foreground dark:aria-invalid:ring-destructive/40 [&_svg]:pointer-events-none [&_svg]:shrink-0 [&_svg:not([class*='size-'])]:size-4",
13:   {
14:     defaultVariants: {
15:       size: "default",
16:       variant: "default",
17:     },
18:     variants: {
19:       size: {
20:         default: "h-9 min-w-9 px-2",
21:         icon: "size-9",
22:         "icon-sm": "size-8",
23:         lg: "h-10 min-w-10 px-2.5",
24:         sm: "h-8 min-w-8 px-1.5",
25:       },
26:       variant: {
27:         default: "bg-transparent",
28:         ghost:
29:           "hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground dark:hover:bg-accent/50 data-[state=on]:bg-accent/80 data-[state=on]:text-accent-foreground",
30:         outline:
31:           "border border-input bg-transparent shadow-xs hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground",
32:         secondary:
33:           "bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 data-[state=on]:bg-secondary/60",
34:       },
35:     },
36:   }
37: );
38: 
39: const Toggle = ({
40:   className,
41:   variant,
42:   size,
43:   onPressedChange,
44:   ...props
45: }: React.ComponentProps<typeof TogglePrimitive.Root> &
46:   VariantProps<typeof toggleVariants>) => {
47:   const playOn = useFeedback({ sound: "toggleOn" });
48:   const playOff = useFeedback({ sound: "toggleOff" });
49: 
50:   const handlePressedChange = (pressed: boolean) => {
51:     if (pressed) {
52:       playOn();
53:     } else {
54:       playOff();
55:     }
56:     onPressedChange?.(pressed);
57:   };
58: 
59:   return (
60:     <TogglePrimitive.Root
61:       data-slot="toggle"
62:       className={cn(toggleVariants({ className, size, variant }))}
63:       onPressedChange={handlePressedChange}
64:       {...props}
65:     />
66:   );
67: };
68: 
69: export { Toggle, toggleVariants };
